message:
perf: refine CAS loops to compare_exchange_weak with match-arm retry and tighten atomic orderings

Systematically replace the load-inside-loop + compare_exchange pattern
with an idiomatic load-before-loop + compare_exchange_weak + match { Ok
=> break, Err(actual) => current = actual } pattern across all CAS-based
lock-free algorithms. This enables hardware LL/SC optimizations on ARM
(spurious failure is cheap) and eliminates redundant loads on retry.

Affected CAS sites:
- Bulkhead: try_acquire, process_queue_inner, release_permit (3 loops)
- CircuitBreaker: should_allow open→half-open transition, half-open
  probe increment, record_success closed/half-open paths,
  record_failure closed→open/half-open→open (8+ CAS sites total)
- ClockSkewStats: max_abs_skew_ns monotonic update
- VirtualClock: advance CAS loop
- Notify: stored_notifications consume in Init and re-check paths
- OnceCell: UNINIT→INITIALIZING in set, get_or_init, try_get_or_init,
  and async get_or_init_async (4 sites)
- LamportClock: merge CAS
- EpochContext: operations_used budget CAS
- BlockingPool: active_threads CAS

Atomic ordering refinements:
- SymbolCancelToken::cancel: AcqRel → Release (publish-side only)
- EpochBarrier::arrived/EpochClock::current loads: SeqCst → Acquire
- EpochBarrier::arrive/EpochClock::advance fetch_add: SeqCst → AcqRel
- CircuitBreaker (error/recovery.rs): transition/reset SeqCst → Release
- TaskWakeState::finish_poll: AcqRel → Release (see inline comment for
  justification: Acquire on success is redundant since Polling was
  written by the same thread)
- Semaphore permits_shadow: all stores/loads demoted from Release/Acquire
  to Relaxed because the shadow is an advisory fast-path hint protected
  by the state mutex — stale reads only cause a benign try_acquire miss
  or skip the fast path. On ARM this eliminates a store-release barrier
  per permit acquisition.

Also add #[inline] annotations to TaskWakeState hot-path methods
(notify, begin_poll, finish_poll, clear, is_notified).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -198,7 +198,7 @@ impl SymbolCancelToken {
         if self
             .state
             .cancelled
-            .compare_exchange(false, true, Ordering::AcqRel, Ordering::Acquire)
+            .compare_exchange(false, true, Ordering::Release, Ordering::Acquire)
             .is_ok()
         {
             self.state
